title: Missing #[non_exhaustive] on public OscoreError enum
description:
Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:64
Issue: OscoreError is a public enum without #[non_exhaustive]. Adding new error variants would be a breaking change.
Impact: Callers using exhaustive match will break if new variants added.
Fix: Add #[non_exhaustive] attribute to OscoreError.
